A mystery-minded record built around a creek runs warm during snow and steams only beside one old fence post.

A mystery-minded record built around crickets in one meadow seem to chirp in uneven counts people begin treating as a warning.

A mountain drinks the first thunder so people can learn the difference between warning and fear.

Strange Nature

A strange archive note about a pond reflects a pattern like stars at noon even when the sky is clear.

A strange archive note about leaves seem to float upstream around one bend before joining the current again.

The field sounds ordinary until the fence line, where the insects seem to stop as if they have reached a rule.
